entity.label: Heber
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: passing over. Son of Beriah and grandson of Asher ( Genesis 46:17 ; 1 Chronicles 7:31 1 Chronicles 7:32 ).

nodes.label: Heber
nodes.description: passing over. Son of Beriah and grandson of Asher ( Genesis 46:17 ; 1 Chronicles 7:31 1 Chronicles 7:32 ).

nodes.label: Beriah
nodes.description: One of Asher’s four sons, and father of Heber (Gen. 46:17).

nodes.label: Shua
nodes.description: A daughter of Heber the Asherite (1 Chr. 7:32).

nodes.label: Hotham
nodes.description: A stroke, great-grandson of Asher (1 Chr. 7:35).

nodes.label: Shamer
nodes.description: A man of Asher (1 Chr. 7:32); called also Shamer (34).

verses.text: And the sons of Asher; Jimnah, and Ishuah, and Isui, and Beriah, and Serah their sister: and the sons of Beriah; Heber, and Malchiel.
Of the sons of Beriah: of Heber, the family of the Heberites: of Malchiel, the family of the Malchielites.
And the sons of Beriah; Heber, and Malchiel, who is the father of Birzavith.
And Heber begat Japhlet, and Shomer, and Hotham, and Shua their sister.
And Joanna the wife of Chuza Herod’s steward, and Susanna, and many others, which ministered unto him of their substance.
I will hear thee, said he, when thine accusers are also come. And he commanded him to be kept in Herod’s judgment hall.
